microsoft_ft: Owned the **technical relationship** with enterprise customers (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), scaling Azure's recovery validation from a 2-person effort into a platformized system sustaining 45+ annual drills and driving **$14M+ business impact**.

Served as bridge lead on a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, addressing technical objections and mitigating risk across 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility.

Built customized, use-case demonstrations of a rack-level drill capability in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical defects and establishing a repeatable model adopted across enterprise service teams.

Drove adoption through AI-powered automation, building an internal AI agent and API integrations that cut planning cycle time **39%** and increased drill capacity **21%**, ensuring customers achieved measurable outcomes.
microsoft_2023: Championed adoption of AI-driven code-generation workflows, delivering hands-on demos and training that drove utilization across **14 teams** and saved 37 engineering hours monthly across Azure service partners.

Optimized data retrieval by setting metadata standards and migrating documentation to an AI-powered semantic search tool, cutting lookup time **83%** and improving the technical support experience for internal customers.

Mobilized a product strategy to mitigate launch toil, running discovery with **20+ service teams** to quantify 81 hours of manual effort per region and roadmapping automation of critical quote-to-launch paths.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize high-impact, measurable support investments.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies and backlog prioritization to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and improving cross-team delivery predictability.
Drove alignment to implement automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle 25% and reducing release risk for business-critical robotics systems.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost **13%** and lifted conversions 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google Business profile.

tailoring_notes: Dropped to min bullets per role and tightened phrasing to fit one page.
